$comment: Declarative DESIRED Cloudflare DNS state for transscendsurvival.org. Source of truth for drift detection only (scripts/cf-dns-check.mts). This file does NOT apply anything: no agent or workflow mutates Cloudflare from it. Editing it changes what 'no drift' means, not the live zone. CONTAINS NO SECRETS.

invariants.$comment: Apex CUT to Cloudflare Pages on 2026-06-23 (was grey A/AAAA -> GitHub Pages). The 2026-06-22 outage was an apex re-proxy BEFORE the Pages custom domain was active; here the Pages domain (transscendsurvival.org on project transscendsurvival-org) was validated ACTIVE first, so the guard is INVERTED: the apex must stay a PROXIED CNAME to the Pages project. www stays a grey CNAME (still GitHub Pages, 301 -> apex) until separately cut.
